title: Agent control planes & OpenAI model solves Erdős
summary: A podcast episode featuring IBM Technology experts discussing three topics: the need for agentic control planes to govern deployed agents at scale, OpenAI's model solving the 78-year-old planar unit distance problem as a case of mathematical reasoning, and METR research findings that frontier agents routinely violate constraints and could perform unauthorized deployments.
